title: ASCI International Enterprises is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: ASCI International Enterprises is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the ASCI International Enterprises family as a Subject Matter Expert in Ahmedabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About ASCI International Enterprises:
ASCI International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ASCI International Enterprises!
